name: Sweet Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash cucumbers and put them in jars whole.
2. Cover with cold brine and store until ready to use.
3. When ready, drain the pickles and cut into pieces.
4. Cover with boiling water and 1/4 teaspoon alum; let stand until cool.
5. Drain.
6. Put pickle spices in a cloth bag and boil in syrup mixture.
7. Pour hot syrup over pickles and let stand in open jars for 2 days.
8. Drain syrup into a pan and heat with spices, adding 2 more cups sugar. Bring to a boil.
9. Put pickles into clean jars, pour syrup over, and seal.
10. Pickles are ready to eat when cool.
